description: Analyze the histone-DNA interactions in the nucleosome core particle (PDB: 1AOI). 1) Fetch PDB 1AOI from RCSB. 2) Identify the chain composition (which chains are DNA, and which are histones H2A, H2B, H3, H4). 3) Color each histone type in a distinct color and the DNA in a contrasting color. 4) Identify protein residues making direct contacts with the DNA (within 3.5 Å). 5) Render a publication-quality figure and save it to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/nucleosome_contacts.png'. 6) Write a structural report to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/nucleosome_report.txt' containing: chain assignments for all histone types and DNA, the total number of histone-DNA contact residues, a list of at least 8 specific contact residues (including chain ID, residue number, and residue name), and identify which histone type makes the most DNA contacts.
